Inspect the current runtime configuration

Usage:
  ogham config [command]

Available Commands:
  show        Print the resolved config (API keys masked)

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for config

Global Flags:
      --legacy          Route through the Python MCP sidecar instead of native Go
      --python          Alias for --legacy
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)

Use "ogham config [command] --help" for more information about a command.
